name: CONTRACT-BUG-29
title: find-feature.py leaks file handles via json.load(open(fj)) and may scan unrelated 'features' dirs
description: scripts/find-feature.py lines 22, 41, 51, 67 use json.load(open(fj)) without closing the file (resource leak under repeated invocation). Lines 25-35 walk any top-level directory containing a 'features' subdirectory — this could include unrelated user dirs. The scan also processes rabbit-internal .claude/features twice if a user project is named .claude. Wrap open() in with-statements.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
